scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cqut/shared build && pnpm --filter @cqut/identity-core build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @cqut/shared build && pnpm --filter @cqut/identity-core build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @cqut/shared build && pnpm --filter @cqut/identity-core build && tsx --test test/**/*.test.ts
